items.question: Is BeAFox really free?
items.answer: Yes — getting started is completely free. You can complete lessons, get to know Bea, and walk through your first situation. BeAFox Unlimited unlocks full access.

items.question: What makes Bea different from other finance apps?
items.answer: Bea isn’t a chatbot quoting Wikipedia. Bea understands your situation—whether you’re an apprentice, student, or early-career professional—and recommends the steps that matter for you now. Personalized, neutral, and no product sales.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Absolutely. BeAFox is GDPR compliant, hosted in Germany, and doesn’t sell user data. We’re independent—no bank, no insurer, no product pushing.

items.question: Who is BeAFox for?
items.answer: Anyone aged 16–30 who wants to take charge of their money—especially apprentices, students, and career starters. Schools and training companies also use BeAFox for their audiences.

experienceSection.title: We speak from
experienceSection.quote: "First paycheck, spent it all, month over – and then came the bills, late notices, and debt. Nobody ever taught us how money really works."
experienceSection.paragraph1: We were apprentices ourselves – young, excited, finally earning our own money. But without knowing anything about budgets, saving, or contracts, we burned through every cent. Overdrafts, installment traps, subscription pitfalls. What started as freedom quickly turned into real stress: sleepless nights, shame, and the feeling of being completely alone with it.
experienceSection.paragraph2: That exact feeling was the spark behind BeAFox. We don't want the next generation to repeat these mistakes. So we built an app that teaches financial knowledge the way we wished someone had taught us back then: honestly, clearly, and without judgment.
experienceSection.paragraph3: If even one person makes one fewer mistake because of BeAFox – it was all worth it.

items.question: Are there rewards or progress indicators?
items.answer: Yes! You can earn points, complete missions and track your progress at any time – learning made fun. The gamified system motivates you to learn continuously and improve your financial literacy.

items.question: How much does BeAFox cost for educational institutions?
items.answer: To make financial education accessible to all students, we offer fair, tiered pricing for schools. For schools the price is €1 per student per year. For businesses we offer tiered pricing from 10 licenses from €3.99 per month. Contact us for a custom quote.

items.question: Is there a teacher or admin access?
items.answer: Yes, for teachers, trainers and admins we offer a comprehensive dashboard where you can create student accounts, manage classes and view participants' learning progress in detail. The dashboard also provides analytics and reports.

items.question: Is BeAFox really independent and neutral?
items.answer: Yes, absolutely! We focus purely on knowledge transfer. No financial products are promoted in the app, so the content feels honest and trustworthy. Our mission is to provide real financial education, not to sell products.

items.question: How does the gamified system work?
items.answer: With a gamified system of points, missions, rewards and leaderboards, learning no longer feels like a chore. Students stay motivated and learn sustainably. You can level up, unlock achievements and compete with others.

items.question: Can I use BeAFox as an individual?
items.answer: Yes! BeAFox is also available to individuals. You get full access to all lessons and can learn at your own pace. We offer different subscription models: Monthly (€4.99), annual (€3.99/month) or lifetime (€49.99 one-time).

items.question: How evidence-based is BeAFox?
items.answer: We use evidence-based teaching methods to create lessons that successfully improve your financial knowledge. Our research project with over 500 participants has shown that our methods work. Content is developed by financial experts and educators.

items.question: What is the difference between BeAFox for Schools and BeAFox for Business?
items.answer: BeAFox for Schools targets educational institutions and offers a monitoring dashboard for teachers. BeAFox for Business targets training companies and additionally includes regular workshops (every 6 months), official certificates and extended reporting.

items.question: Can I try BeAFox before buying?
items.answer: Yes, we're happy to offer a free trial. Contact us for more information and a demo. Schools can start a pilot project to try BeAFox with no obligation.

items.question: How often is new content added?
items.answer: We continuously work on new lessons and features. All users receive regular updates with new content and improvements. Our goal is to publish new lessons monthly and larger feature updates quarterly.

items.question: Is there support if I have questions?
items.answer: Yes, our support is there for you around the clock and will answer your requests as quickly and helpfully as possible. Contact us anytime via email, the contact form or directly in the app!

items.question: Does BeAFox work on all devices?
items.answer: BeAFox is available as an app for iOS and Android. The monitoring dashboard for teachers and trainers works in the browser on all devices (desktop, tablet, smartphone). The app syncs your progress automatically across devices.

items.question: How secure is my data?
items.answer: Data protection and security are our top priorities. We use modern encryption and strictly comply with GDPR. Your data is stored securely and never shared with third parties.

items.question: Can I export my progress?
items.answer: Yes, you can export your progress and certificates at any time. For schools and businesses we also offer detailed reports and analytics as PDF or Excel export.

items.question: Are there workshops or training sessions?
items.answer: Yes! We offer interactive financial education workshops for schools, companies and associations. Workshops can be held on-site or online and are led by experienced facilitators. Contact us for more information.

items.question: What is included in the price?
items.answer: The price includes full app access, all learning modules, monitoring dashboards (for schools/businesses), support and regular updates. Business packages also include workshops and certificates.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: For individuals: The monthly subscription can be cancelled at any time. Annual subscriptions run for the agreed term. For schools and businesses, individual agreements apply and can be flexible.

items.question: Are there discounts for multiple classes or locations?
items.answer: Yes, we offer tiered pricing for larger institutions. The more students or employees, the lower the price per person. Contact us for a custom offer tailored to your needs.

meta.description: Learn more about BeAFox – our mission, values, and how we're revolutionizing financial education for young people. Meet our team and our vision.

hero.subtitle: With expertise, creativity, and passion we work every day to make financial education accessible to everyone.

story.problemText: Our founders are only 21 years old and know from their own experience what it feels like to be completely at sea with money. During their training they got into debt themselves but fought their way back. That personal experience motivated them to build a solution to help other young people avoid these challenges.
story.solutionText: With BeAFox we've finally created a way to teach finance – often seen as boring – in a lasting and understandable way. We want the next generation to gain financial knowledge independently and with motivation. No pressure, no feeling of being forced. Through gamification, clear structure, and evidence-based methods we make financial education an experience that's fun.

intro.heading: The only finance app
intro.subtitle: Through Eduplaces, schools license digital tools — quickly, GDPR-compliant, and without an IT project.
intro.statHeading: Only financial education app on Eduplaces
intro.p1: Eduplaces is the central app store for German schools. Hundreds of apps for maths, languages, computing — but until now, not a single one for financial education. BeAFox fills that gap as the first and only listed app for financial capability.
bullets: Licensed directly via Eduplaces — no separate contract needed
Data processing agreement and GDPR compliance already in place
Servers in Germany, no ads, no product placements

features.title: What your school
features.subtitle: Two parts, one goal: students who can make financial decisions independently.

items.title: The app students open by choice
items.description: Short lessons, quizzes, missions, and leaderboards. Financial skills taught in a playful way — budgeting, debt prevention, saving, insurance. Students learn at their own pace, not from chalk-and-talk only.

items.title: The dashboard that supports teachers
items.description: View progress, unlock modules, manage classes. Teachers keep oversight without extra workload — all in one interface.

items.title: The security school authorities need
items.description: Fully GDPR-compliant with a data processing agreement on file. Servers in Germany. No advertising, no product recommendations, no sales agenda. Completely neutral and independent.

items.title: Live in minutes — not months
items.text: No tender process, no IT project, no paperwork marathon. You license BeAFox directly through Eduplaces and your students can start the same day.

items.title: Data protection is already sorted
items.text: The data processing agreement is available via Eduplaces, servers in Germany, GDPR compliance reviewed. No endless back-and-forth with your data protection officer.

items.title: Financial education is missing — everywhere
items.text: On Eduplaces there are apps for almost every subject. Until now, there was not a single one for financial education. BeAFox answers a need that is rarely in the curriculum but matters in your students’ lives every day.

items.quote: Die Fortbildung war äußerst bereichernd und ist absolut empfehlenswert. Der Referentin gelang es hervorragend, ein komplexes Thema lebendig und verständlich darzustellen. Ich freue mich bereits darauf, die Unterlagen in meinem Unterricht einzusetzen.

faq.title: Häufige Fragen
faq.subtitle: Alles, was Sie über BeAFox für Schulen wissen müssen.

items.question: Wie lange dauert die Einrichtung?
items.answer: Die Einrichtung geht schnell und unkompliziert. Nach der Beratung richten wir die App für Ihre Schule ein und erstellen Accounts für alle Schüler. Der gesamte Prozess dauert in der Regel nur wenige Tage.

items.question: Benötigen die Schüler eigene Geräte?
items.answer: Nein, BeAFox funktioniert auf allen gängigen Geräten – Smartphones, Tablets und Computern. Die Schüler können die App auf ihren eigenen Geräten nutzen oder auf schuleigenen Geräten.

items.question: Wie werden die Daten geschützt?
items.answer: Alle Daten werden sicher und DSGVO-konform gespeichert. Wir legen großen Wert auf Datenschutz und Sicherheit. Ihre Schülerdaten sind bei uns in besten Händen.

items.question: Können wir BeAFox testen, bevor wir uns entscheiden?
items.answer: Ja, gerne! Wir bieten eine kostenlose Beratung und können Ihnen auch eine Testphase ermöglichen. Kontaktieren Sie uns einfach für weitere Informationen.

items.question: Was passiert, wenn wir BeAFox nicht mehr nutzen möchten?
items.answer: Kein Problem! Sie können BeAFox jederzeit monatlich kündigen. Es gibt keine langfristigen Verträge oder versteckten Kosten.

items.question: Gibt es Schulungen für Lehrkräfte?
items.answer: Ja, wir bieten Fortbildungen für Lehrkräfte an, in denen wir das System, das Dashboard und die besten Praktiken für den Einsatz im Unterricht erklären.

meta.title: IHK Academy – AzubiGo: Financial education for apprentices
meta.description: AzubiGo is the workshop series from BeAFox and IHK Academy Eastern Bavaria. 3.5 hours of practical financial education for apprentices — with an IHK certificate.

hero.cardText: Together with the IHK Academy, we help apprentices become financially capable.
hero.description: The official workshop series from BeAFox and IHK Academy Eastern Bavaria. Practical, playful, and with a certificate.

intro.heading: IHK quality meets
intro.p1: AzubiGo is the joint workshop series from BeAFox and the IHK Academy in Eastern Bavaria. In 3.5 hours, apprentices learn the essential basics of money — interactively, practically, and with the BeAFox app as a companion.
intro.p2: What makes it special: the workshop combines IHK-approved content with Bea’s playful learning system. Apprentices use the app, complete missions together, and take what they learn straight into everyday life.
bullets: Official IHK certificate for every participant
Combination of live workshop and app-based learning
Available on-site in Regensburg or online

images.certificateAlt: IHK certificate — AzubiGo workshop with BeAFox

topics.title: What apprentices learn in the
topics.subtitle: 3.5 hours of focused financial knowledge — interactive, not lecture-style.

items.title: Apprentices who manage their money are more likely to stay
items.text: Financial stress is the most common reason people drop out of training. After AzubiGo, your apprentices know what to do with their pay — so they can focus on the apprenticeship.

items.title: Your reputation as a training company grows
items.text: Companies that invest in real life skills attract applicants. AzubiGo with an IHK certificate is a selling point for every careers page and every training flyer.

items.title: Zero extra work for your team
items.text: You register your apprentices; we handle the rest. Workshop in the morning, back on the job in the afternoon — no multi-day seminar, no internal programme someone has to run.

benefits.title: Why companies book
benefits.subtitle: The workshop pays off — for apprentices and for you.

items.title: Just 3.5 hours — maximum impact
items.description: Half a day is enough. Apprentices leave with concrete knowledge and a plan for their money.

items.title: IHK certificate included
items.description: Every participant receives an official IHK certificate — ideal for training reports and reviews.

items.title: App access included
items.description: After the workshop, apprentices keep learning with Bea — playfully, at their pace, with no extra effort for you.

items.title: On-site or online
items.description: Flexible booking: in person in Regensburg or as a live online workshop in the virtual training room.

items.title: No frontal teaching

content.text: These General Terms and Conditions (GTC) apply to all contracts between BeAFox UG (limited liability), Siemensweg 2, 93073 Neutraubling (hereinafter "BeAFox") and its customers regarding the use of the BeAFox app and related services.

BeAFox provides a mobile learning app for financial education. The app enables users to gain and deepen financial knowledge in a playful way. Additional services such as workshops, monitoring dashboards, and certificates are offered for educational institutions and companies.

The contract is concluded by BeAFox accepting the offer. Acceptance may be in writing, by email, or by using the app. For in-app purchases via app stores (Apple App Store, Google Play Store), the payment contract is concluded exclusively with the respective app store operator. BeAFox only provides the content.

content.text: BeAFox strives to ensure high availability. Maintenance work, further development, or technical issues may temporarily restrict access. There is no entitlement to uninterrupted availability at all times. Maintenance windows will be announced in advance where possible.

Prices are stated in euros plus statutory VAT. Payment is made as agreed in the contract. In the event of late payment, default interest of 9 percentage points above the base interest rate will be charged.

meta.title: Blog
meta.description: BeAFox blog — articles, updates, and news about financial education, our app, and the BeAFox community.
meta.ogDescription: Articles, updates, and news about financial education and the BeAFox community.

hero.subtitle: Learn more about our journey, events, updates, and how we’re revolutionizing financial education for young people.

specialMomentsSection.subtitle: The most important milestones of our journey with BeAFox.

allArticlesSection.subtitle: Explore all our blog posts and updates.

specialMoments.title: We won!
specialMoments.description: We’re proud to have won the Deggendorfer Gründerpreis! Despite nerves and a last-minute pitch update, our work paid off—around 60% of the audience voted for us. Thanks to the whole team for the great organization and the €2,500 prize. We’re excited for the next steps with BeAFox!

specialMoments.title: BeAFox at Ed.One in Munich!
specialMoments.description: This is what financial education feels like in the classroom. At the Ed.One Summit in Munich, students, teachers, and trainers tested BeAFox live—from the dashboard to the learning app and worksheets. We received valuable feedback, made exciting connections, and presented our pitch. BeAFox shows how simple financial education can be. We’re looking for you!

specialMoments.title: BeAFox wins Startup Summit!
specialMoments.description: BeAFox achieved 2nd place at Startup Summit Germany—our first official award! For the first time, we pitched as a duo with a new pitch, deck, and an even clearer vision. After two years of hard work, it shows that perseverance, courage, and teamwork pay off. Thanks to Volksbank am Württemberg eG for this great event!

articles.title: Startchancen program
articles.description: Big news: BeAFox is part of the Startchancen program! This allows schools to fully fund our learning app through subsidies. For us, it’s a strong signal that financial education belongs in everyday school life. Many of us would have loved an offer like this in school—practical, playful, and relevant. Now we can reach schools that previously had little access to such opportunities, bringing us closer to real equal opportunities.

articles.title: Rütteltest with the Economic Junior Chamber Regensburg
articles.description: At the Rütteltest of the Wirtschaftsjunioren Regensburg we pitched BeAFox for over 20 minutes and then received more than an hour of honest, in-depth feedback from six experts. Our entire business model was constructively challenged—exactly what we wanted. We’re taking away many impulses, set new priorities, and decided to join the organization right away. An experience we recommend to any startup.

articles.title: Our first workshop.
articles.description: Our first financial education workshop for apprentices—combined with the BeAFox app—was a great success. Instead of one-off theory, we focus on practical exercises: building personal budgets, opening a brokerage account, planning first investments, understanding insurance, and using a tax return. The best part: with BeAFox, participants can keep learning after the workshop and deepen their knowledge. Companies get a sustainable education offering.

articles.title: BeAFox at DemoNight in Nuremberg
articles.description: BeAFox at BayStartup’s DemoNight in Nuremberg: right when we arrived, a founder approached us who knew us from social media—a small moment that motivated us a lot. The evening was full of exciting conversations, new contacts, and innovative ideas. Events like this remind us why we build BeAFox: to solve real problems and bring financial education to where it truly matters in young people’s everyday lives.

articles.title: What an experience: YFC
articles.description: What an experience: we attended YFC in Munich with BeAFox, the first conference of the Young Founders Network. Between inspiring speakers, many startups, and great networking, we showcased our learning app at our own booth. The organization, atmosphere, and conversations impressed us. A special highlight: the announcement of the Young Founders Fund—a chance we definitely want to pursue.

articles.title: BeAFox at the Summit of the Entrepreneurship Foundation
articles.description: BeAFox at the Summit of the Stiftung Entrepreneurship in Berlin—an inspiring weekend. Again and again we heard: “Financial education is important!” and felt how big the need for modern solutions is. We presented our app, received consistently positive feedback, and had intense conversations with people who take the topic as seriously as we do. This event strengthened our vision even more.

articles.title: BeAFox at the BÖB Congress
articles.description: At the congress of Bündnis Ökonomische Bildung Deutschland, there was a lot of discussion about making financial education a standalone school subject—with new textbooks, courses, and training. I asked: is that really enough? With teacher shortages and a topic many people avoid talking about? I believe we also need new paths: digital tools, gamification, and project-based learning. That’s exactly where BeAFox comes in—as a complement, not a competitor to teaching.

articles.title: We did it
articles.description: With BeAFox we achieved 2nd place at Startup Summit Germany! Our first team pitch together, a new deck, a new concept—and an award including prize money. After two intense years of testing, discarding, and improving, this moment feels like a strong sign: our idea works. A huge thank you to everyone supporting us and to Volksbank am Württemberg eG.

articles.title: I pitched BeAFox at Innovation Day
articles.description: My first pitch in English—five minutes at Innovation Day in front of an international audience. Even though we didn’t win this time, it was an incredibly valuable experience. I presented BeAFox on a new stage, gained new perspectives on financial education, and made many exciting connections. Moments like these show how important it is to be brave, try new things, and continuously improve.

articles.title: BeAFox at ChamlandSchau
articles.description: Left school at 18, no plan for life, and built up debt—that’s how my story began. Today I’ve learned how to handle money and built a startup with BeAFox that tackles exactly that. At ChamlandSchau, our small booth stood among big companies—and still we had nonstop conversations. It shows: young people feel that financial education is missing and are looking for answers.

articles.title: Release in App Store & Play Store
articles.description: It’s happening: BeAFox is officially available in the App Store and Play Store! After more than 1.5 years of development, testing, and countless adjustments, we went live—three months earlier than planned. Our goal: make financial education as simple and accessible as possible, without ads or hidden sales interests. Now every download, every feedback, and every recommendation helps us reach more young people.

articles.title: Donau-Post article
articles.description: BeAFox in the newspaper—this time with a very special headline: “We need to talk about money!” Donau-Post published an in-depth article about us and how an idea became a real learning offer for schools. After 1.5 years of work, doubts, and many late nights, this moment is special. It shows that the time invested pays off—and our mission is reaching more and more people.

articles.title: A new logo for BeAFox
articles.description: Feedback is gold: our first logo felt improvised and not professional enough—so we acted. Together with a designer, we created a new BeAFox logo: more modern, clear, friendly, and perfectly aligned with our target group. For us this is more than a design update. It’s a symbol of how seriously we take our mission and how important a consistent brand presence is for schools, companies, and users.

articles.title: Mittelbayerische Zeitung
articles.description: “From smartphone to finance fox” — that was the headline of our first major article in Mittelbayerische Zeitung. A goosebump moment to see our vision in print. Focus: why financial education is so important for young people, how BeAFox supports teachers in class, and why we intentionally stay independent from ads and sales interests. A huge thank you to everyone involved!

articles.title: BeAFox in the classroom for the first time
articles.description: Today was special: BeAFox was used in real class for the first time—at the State Secondary School Neutraubling. Together with 25 students we tried financial education with the app. Result: 24 out of 25 want BeAFox to be a fixed part of their lessons. For us, a strong signal that young people want digital, interactive formats—and that our approach fits the classroom.

articles.title: Another successful pitch for BeAFox
articles.description: At Ideenpitch Region Nürnberg we presented BeAFox outside Regensburg for the first time. The improved pitch was well received and helped make our idea clearer and more tangible. We especially enjoyed the many conversations with people from education and business. Our goal: bring BeAFox to schools in time for the Bavarian school start—so financial education finally arrives where it belongs.

articles.title: My first pitch — in front of 200+ people
articles.description: My very first pitch—and straight away in front of more than 200 people at the “Tigers” of TechBase Regensburg! I presented our BeAFox vision, why financial education is so important for young people, and how our app addresses that gap. The conversations afterward were especially valuable: teachers, students, and companies recognized themselves in the story and showed interest in collaborating.

articles.title: It’s official. We went to the notary
articles.description: BeAFox is officially founded: we went to the notary and signed the articles of association—a major milestone after months of ideas, feedback, and testing. Our goal remains clear: make financial education understandable, independent, and playful for young people. Next up: trademark registration, more pilot projects with schools and companies, and the next big step toward a breakthrough.

articles.title: What a day: DENK.Summit
articles.description: With BeAFox we presented our startup in the startup area of DENK.Summit—with overwhelmingly positive feedback: “insanely beautiful booth”, “cool branding, you really stand out”. In just two hours, 50+ pupils and students tested the app. Almost everyone confirmed: financial education barely happens in schools today. This experience once again showed us how important our mission is.

sections.title: Information on the collection of personal data

content.subtitle: General
content.text: Below we inform you about the collection of personal data when using this website and our app. Personal data is all data that can be related to you personally, e.g. name, address, email addresses, user behaviour.

sections.title: Your rights as a data subject

content.subtitle: Right of access (Art. 15 GDPR)
content.text: You have the right to request information about your personal data processed by us. In particular, you can request information about:
list: the data stored about you by us

content.subtitle: Right to rectification (Art. 16 GDPR)

content.subtitle: Right to erasure (Art. 17 GDPR)

content.subtitle: Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
content.text: You have the right to request the restriction of the processing of your personal data.

content.subtitle: Right to data portability (Art. 20 GDPR)
content.text: You have the right to receive your personal data that you have provided to us in a structured, commonly used and machine-readable format.

content.subtitle: Right to object (Art. 21 GDPR)
content.text: You have the right to object at any time to the processing of your personal data on grounds relating to your particular situation, where processing is based on Art. 6(1)(e) or (f) GDPR.

content.subtitle: Withdrawal of consent
content.text: If you have given your consent to the processing of your personal data, you can withdraw it at any time. The lawfulness of processing carried out until the withdrawal is not affected. Please direct any requests for information, access or objections regarding data processing to info@beafox.app or to the address stated above.

content.subtitle: Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (Art. 77 GDPR)
content.text: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority regarding the processing of your personal data. The supervisory authority responsible is usually that of your place of residence, workplace or the place of the alleged infringement.
details: The authority responsible for us is:

content.text: We maintain current technical measures to ensure data security, in particular to protect your personal data from risks during data transmission and from unauthorised access by third parties. These are adapted in line with the current state of the art.

content.subtitle: TLS encryption
content.text: We use TLS encryption for the transmission of content (recognisable by "https://" and the padlock symbol in the browser). This protects your data from unauthorised access.

content.subtitle: Hosting
content.text: Our website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA. We have concluded a data processing agreement with the host in accordance with Art. 28 GDPR.

content.subtitle: Server log files
content.text: When you access our website, our host automatically collects data and information in so-called server log files. This includes in particular:
list: Time zone difference to Greenwich Mean Time (GMT)
Referrer URL (website from which the request originates)
Language and version of the browser software

content.subtitle: Legal basis
content.text: Processing is based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR. Our legitimate interest lies in the technical provision of the website, ensuring stability and security, and investigating abuse or fraud.

content.subtitle: What are cookies?
content.text: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your hard drive and assigned to the browser you use. They provide certain information to the party that sets the cookie (in this case, us). Cookies cannot execute programs or transmit viruses to your computer. They serve to make our website more user-friendly and effective.

content.subtitle: Use of cookies
content.text: We use cookies to identify you on subsequent visits if you have an account with us. Otherwise you would have to log in again for each visit.

content.subtitle: Types of cookies
content.text: This website uses cookies to the following extent:
list: Transient cookies (temporary use): Transient cookies are automatically deleted when you close your browser. These include in particular session cookies. These store a so-called session ID that allows various requests from your browser to be assigned to the same session. This allows your computer to be recognised when you return to the website. Session cookies are deleted when you log out or close your browser.

content.subtitle: Consent via consent tool
content.text: Where we use cookies that are not technically necessary (e.g. for statistics or marketing purposes), we obtain your prior consent via a consent management tool. We currently do not use cookies for analysis or marketing purposes.

content.subtitle: Legal basis
content.text: The storage of information on your device or access to it takes place, where not strictly necessary, on the basis of your consent (§ 25(1) TTDSG in conjunction with Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR). We use technically necessary cookies on the basis of § 25(2) TTDSG and Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.

content.subtitle: Data separation
content.text: This stored information is kept separate from any other data you may provide to us. In particular, cookie data is not linked to your other data.

content.text: When you send us enquiries via the contact form, the information you provide from the enquiry form, including the contact details you provide there, is stored for the purpose of processing the enquiry and in case of follow-up questions. content.text: For sending emails we use the SendGrid service (Twilio SendGrid, Inc., 1801 California Street, Suite 500, Denver, CO 80202, USA). We have concluded a data processing agreement with the provider in accordance with Art. 28 GDPR. SendGrid processes data in the USA. We have agreed standard contractual clauses (SCC) with SendGrid to ensure an adequate level of data protection.

content.text: The legal basis for processing data from the contact form and emails is Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR if your enquiry relates to the conclusion or performance of a contract, and Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR otherwise. Our legitimate interest lies in processing enquiries.

content.subtitle: Purpose of processing
content.text: This data is used to:
list: Save and display your learning progress

content.subtitle: Legal basis
content.text: Processing is based on Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR for the performance of the user agreement and Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR to improve our services.

content.subtitle: Cloud storage
content.text: Your learning and usage data is stored on our servers to enable synchronisation across different devices. You can access your learning progress on any device.

content.subtitle: Payment processing
content.text: When you make in-app purchases in the BeAFox app (e.g. premium subscription), payment processing is handled by the respective app store (Apple App Store or Google Play Store).

content.subtitle: Processing by app stores
content.text: The app stores process the following data:

content.subtitle: Legal basis
content.text: Payment data is processed by the app stores in accordance with their respective privacy policies. We only receive confirmations of successful payments, not payment data.

content.subtitle: Note
content.text: Please refer to the privacy policies of Apple (https://www.apple.com/privacy/) and Google (https://policies.google.com/privacy) for further information on the processing of your payment data.

content.subtitle: Purpose
content.text: We may send you push notifications to inform you about new learning content, missions, leaderboard updates or important app updates.

content.subtitle: Consent
content.text: Push notifications are only sent with your express consent. You can deactivate them at any time in the app settings.

content.subtitle: Technical implementation
content.text: We use the services of the respective platform operators (Apple Push Notification Service or Firebase Cloud Messaging from Google) for sending push notifications.

content.subtitle: Legal basis
content.text: Processing is based on your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).

content.subtitle: Links to other websites
content.text: Our website contains links to third-party websites. When you follow a link to one of these websites (which are outside our responsibility), we would like to point out that these websites have their own privacy policies and that we do not accept any responsibility or liability for these policies. Please check these privacy policies before voluntarily providing personal data to these websites.

content.subtitle: Technical necessity
content.text: Data is only transmitted to the link destination when you click on an external link. This is technically necessary due to the protocol underlying the internet (TCP/IP). The transmitted data includes in particular: your IP address, the time you clicked the link, the page on which you clicked the link, and the aforementioned information.

content.subtitle: Social media links
content.text: Our website contains links to our social media profiles (Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok). When you click these links, you are redirected to the respective platforms. Your data is then processed in accordance with the privacy policy of the respective platform.

content.subtitle: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR)
content.text: If you have consented to the processing of your personal data, processing is based on Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR.

content.subtitle: Contract performance (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR)
content.text: If processing is necessary for the performance of a contract to which you are a party, processing is based on Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR.

content.subtitle: Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR)
content.text: If processing is necessary for compliance with a legal obligation, processing is based on Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR.

content.subtitle: Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR)
content.text: Processing may also be based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR if processing is necessary to safeguard a legitimate interest of our company or a third party and the interests, fundamental rights and freedoms of the data subject do not override.

The criterion for the duration of storage of personal data is the respective statutory retention period. After expiry of the period, the data is routinely deleted unless it is still required for contract performance or contract initiation.

content.subtitle: Storage period in detail
content.text: Unless a more specific storage period is stated in this privacy policy, your personal data remains with us until the purpose for data processing ceases to apply. If you assert a legitimate request for erasure or withdraw your consent to data processing, your data will be deleted unless we have other legally permissible reasons for storing your personal data.
As a responsible company, we refrain from automated decision-making or profiling. Your personal data is not used for automated decision-making processes.

content.subtitle: Protection of minors
content.text: Our services are also aimed at minors. We take the protection of minors' privacy very seriously. If you are under 16 years of age, we need the consent of your parents or guardians before we can process your personal data.

content.subtitle: Ensuring parental consent
content.text: We ensure that consent from minors under 16 only takes place with parental consent. During registration in the app, this is ensured by a corresponding checkbox and confirmation by guardians.

content.subtitle: Parental control
content.text: Parents and guardians can request information about the data we store about their children at any time and request its deletion.

content.subtitle: No sensitive data
content.text: We consciously do not process sensitive data within the meaning of Art. 9 GDPR (health data, religious data, etc.). Our app focuses exclusively on imparting financial knowledge.

contact.title: Questions about privacy?
contact.description: If you have questions about this privacy policy or wish to assert your rights, please contact us:

lastUpdated.note: We reserve the right to adapt this privacy policy so that it always meets current legal requirements or reflects changes to our services.
